voiceover: This is an autonomous hackathon orchestration system that takes ideas from challenge prompt to judged leaderboard with reproducible scoring.
An organizer defines the challenge prompt, scoring posture, and run constraints in under a minute.
Starting a run captures a deterministic seed and frozen configuration snapshot for replay-safe evaluation.
Agents execute in isolated sandboxes, with budget guards, spawn controls, and resilient task recovery.
Judge profiles can be registered from JSON, YAML, CSV, or URL ingestion paths protected by network and redirect-chain guards.
Checkpoint scoring blends quality, novelty, feasibility, and criteria with configurable novelty strategy and anti-gaming penalties.
Every checkpoint can be replayed against frozen snapshots, producing deterministic score diffs for audit and analytics.
Leaderboard updates stream in real time, with stable cursor pagination and optional segmentation filters by team or track.
Artifacts are scanned, retained by policy, and served through short-lived signed URLs for controlled access.
The full flow is automated, observable, and reproducible end to end.
